prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第19名，近年排名稳定在Top20，学校层次极高；2026年声誉评价中性/混合，主要涉及学校                        管理回应类事件，无重大负面；抖音热度排名第37位（较热），短视频曝光量处于中上水平，报考关注度较高；数学A、物理学A-、化学A-、统计学A、心理学A+                        、地理学A+、环境科学与工程A等，A-及以上学科达18个，学科实力顶尖，对理科考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类推荐偏热、电子信息/通信高热推荐、电气工程                        及其自动化高热推荐，相关工科专业社会热度高；本省2026年考生总数约120万（较2025年大幅增加），按历史比例估算物理类考生约73.4万人，竞争基数扩大；北京师范大学位于北京，对河南考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河南招生占比约3%-4%，属跨省招生正常水平。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位                         次明显后移的趋势、2026年计划大幅扩招22%以及本省考生总数大幅增加，预计2026年竞争将进一步缓解；但学校顶尖层次与优势学科（尤其是高热工科专业）的吸引力可能部分                         抵消扩招效应；在2025年基准10886名基础上，预测最低位次约12427名，区间11927–12927名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 10535 → 9163 → 9098 → 9133 → 10886. From 2021 to 2024, it was basically stable in the 9000–10500 range. In 2025, it clearly shifted back to about 10886, moving back about 1753 places compared to 2024, indicating some easing of competition. The provincial enrollment plan was 95 in 2021, 109 in 2022, 70 in 2023, 99 in 2024, and 68 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 83, a significant expansion of about 22% compared to 2025, which will notably ease competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science Main Ranking 2026 approximately 19th, stable in the Top20 in recent years, extremely high school level. 2026 reputation evaluation neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, no major negatives. Douyin popularity ranking 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure at upper-middle level, relatively high application attention. Mathematics A, Physics A-, Chemistry A-, Statistics A, Psychology A+, Geography A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A, etc., with 18 disciplines at A- or above, top-tier academic strength, strong appeal to science students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science recommended as relatively hot, electronic information/communication highly recommended, electrical engineering and its automation highly recommended, related engineering majors have high social popularity. The total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), with an estimated 734,000 physics category candidates based on historical proportions, expanding the competition base. Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, with strong regional appeal to Henan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 3%-4%, which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the clear trend of ranking decline in 2025, the significant 22% expansion of the 2026 plan, and the substantial increase in the total number of candidates in the province, competition is expected to further ease in 2026. However, the school's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines (especially high-heat engineering majors) may partially offset the expansion effect. Based on the 2025 baseline of 10886, the predicted minimum ranking is about 12427, with a range of 11927–12927.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 11927–12927, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 11800), you can focus on aiming for top-tier Tier 1 majors such as the Liyun Experimental Class or the Psychology Joint Degree. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 12900), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors for safety, noting that majors in biology, chemistry, environment, and materials have relatively low social popularity.

历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking was approximately 1425 → 1260 → 989 → 916 → 614, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 811 positions over the past 4 years; the 2025 baseline is approximately 614, an increase of about 302 positions from 2024, indicating intensifying competition.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The provincial enrollment plan was 47 in 2021, 47 in 2022, 34 in 2023, 45 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 39, a slight expansion of about 2.6% compared to 2025, slightly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, mainly involving school management response incidents, with no major negative impacts; Douyin popularity ranks 37th (relatively hot), short video exposure is at an upper-middle level, and application attention is high; Education A+, Psychology A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Chinese History A+, Geography A+, Marxist Theory A+, etc., with 18 disciplines at A- or above, indicating top-tier academic strength, strongly attracting candidates; 985, 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking is approximately 19th in 2026, stable in the Top20 in recent years, with an extremely high school level.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Normal/education majors have mixed social popularity with a wait-and-see attitude; Chinese language/Chinese literature majors are recommended as relatively hot; law has a divided wait-and-see attitude; in 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is about 1.2 million (significantly increased from 2025), with an estimated 466,000 history category candidates based on historical proportions, expanding the competition base; Beijing Normal University is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Henan candidates; the university's enrollment proportion in Henan is about 3%-4%, which is normal for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the strong trend of continuous upward movement in historical rankings, the slight expansion of only 2.6% in the 2026 plan, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province, and the sustained appeal of the school's top-tier level and advantageous disciplines, competition is expected to intensify in 2026; on the basis of the 2025 baseline of 614, the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 634, with a range of 562–706.
